General | Coke Freestyle.description: Enjoy more than 100 drink choices with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® single-serve cup.

General | Coke Freestyle Souvenir.description: Enjoy more than 100 drink choices and refills thru the day* with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® souvenir cup. Get 3–6 souvenir cups for $15.99 each, 2 for $17.99 each, or 1 for $19.99 at participating Coca-Cola Freestyle® locations. *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are limited to no more than one (1) pour from the Coca-Cola Freestyle® machine per 10 minutes and valid day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.
